aventurine.title: Aventurine – Honkai Star Rail
aventurine.desc: With this character I really wanted to capture his charisma, swagger, and eccentricity — just as you'd expect from a gambler! Although the original voice leans more toward a mysterious, monotone delivery, I chose to breathe more life and personality into him.
aventurine.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

billy_henshin.title: Billy Henshin – Zenless Zone Zero
billy_henshin.desc: This time, a wildly over-the-top comedic scene radiating the spandex superhero shows of the '90s. Here I bring maximum positive energy, while still leaving room for a bit of the "tough guy" swagger that the hyper-expressive character I'm playing believes himself to have!
billy_henshin.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

edgerunners.title: Edgerunners – Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
edgerunners.desc: In this scene you can feel the strong tension between the characters from beginning to end. I conveyed both the frustrated unease of one and the mocking taunts and superiority of the other. While recording, I didn't approach the material as animation dubbing — to capture the mood even better, I aimed for a natural, cinematic delivery.
edgerunners.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

mr_stark.title: Mr. Stark – Avengers: Infinity War
mr_stark.desc: This was no easy scene — every emotion had to be balanced perfectly so the delivery wouldn't feel overdone, yet wouldn't come across as too stiff either. Given that the medium is live-action film, I also had to keep in mind all the micro-expressions at play.
mr_stark.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

one_piece.title: One Piece – One Piece Live Action
one_piece.desc: In the first half, my main focus was to subtly sketch out all of the character's emotions. I delivered his words very gently and tenderly, as if he were still trying to keep what he truly feels to himself — and only in the second half did the lines become more direct, meant to carry the characters' genuine feelings and honest thoughts.
one_piece.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

chainsaw_man.title: Chainsaw Man – Chainsaw Man
chainsaw_man.desc: In this scene I showcase three modulations, each conveying a different extreme emotion — excitement, motivation, and astonishment. It's a pretty "wild" scene, and I had a blast working on it, getting fully into the characters and capturing their emotions and personality!
chainsaw_man.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

dare_devil.title: Dare Devil – Marvel Rivals
dare_devil.desc: I was inspired to take on this clip by the character's English voice actor, Aleks Le. I decided to challenge myself to modulate my voice and put in all my heart (and lungs) to give Dare Devil's lines the power they deserve!
dare_devil.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

transformers_one.title: Transformers One – Transformers One
transformers_one.desc: Even though the film was made with younger audiences in mind, that doesn't mean its characters' voices don't deserve emotional depth. Modulation wasn't my priority — I focused on the emotion. I wanted to capture the conflict between the characters as faithfully as possible, so in my voice you can hear rage, frustration, worry, sadness, and a pinch of hope.
transformers_one.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

sin.title: Sin – Guilty Gear Strive
sin.desc: I have a soft spot for playing this character — I first recorded him at the very start of my fandubbing career. Recording him again, I feel as if I've grown up alongside him. The progress I've made in such a short time is clear to see. The most important thing is never to rest on your laurels and to keep learning. By sticking to that principle, I was able to analyze this whole character far better and play him even more convincingly!
sin.mic: Rode NT1 5th Gen / Scarlett Solo 4th Gen

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.name: Your Name
Contact.error: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.

PortfolioGrid.dubbingpediaDesc: It features the complete list of the official, professional dubbing projects I've been part of.
PortfolioGrid.instagramDesc: My most active and popular profile right now. I post my own dubs of scenes and funny clips here — purely as a hobby, because dubbing is my passion, after all!
PortfolioGrid.youtubeDesc: On this channel you can see which productions I started out with and how they evolved over the years. These days you can occasionally catch my live streams where I create amateur dubs entirely on my own, from start to finish — from translation, through building the soundtrack, all the way to recording the lines and final production!

DirectContact.title: Let's Talk
DirectContact.subtitle: Tell me about your project and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
DirectContact.successDesc: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
DirectContact.errorDesc: Please try again or email me directly.

LogoTicker.title: And here's where I've performed!
LogoTicker.description: These are the projects, creators, and studios I've had the chance to officially lend my voice to.

SEO.title: Skryty | Professional Voice Artist
SEO.description: Professional voice-over services: commercials, narration, dubbing, and audiobooks. I bring your scripts to life with emotion and clarity.

Error.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

AboutMe.title: About Me
AboutMe.subtitle: A voice that sets the tone
AboutMe.description: I'm a versatile and passionate voice actor specializing in bringing characters, brands, and narration to life. Through years of experience behind the mic, I've developed the ability to adapt my tone in an instant — from warm and conversational to authoritative and cinematic. My goal is simple: to make your script connect with its audience, ensuring every word lands perfectly.
AboutMe.goalsDesc:
I'm eager to work on official, professional dubbing projects, as well as amateur ones.
Depending on the project or your needs, I can work not only for a fee but also free of charge.
I also offer free collaborative directing sessions with the client, remotely or at a studio of the client's choice.
Feel free to reach out — I can't wait to work together!

AudioDemos.title: Audio Demos
AudioDemos.subtitle: Samples without video — pure voice, pure emotion.

acting.title: Acting Demo
acting.desc: A full palette of emotion — from subtle tension to intense drama. A voice tailored to the needs of the character and the mood of the scene.

audiobook.title: Voice-Over Demo
audiobook.desc: A warm, persuasive tone — a voice that grabs attention from the very first second and makes a brand memorable.

commercial1.title: Commercial Demo
commercial1.desc: Energetic dynamics and precise diction. Built for spots that demand pace, expression, and clarity.

commercial2.title: Commercial Demo 2
commercial2.desc: Energetic dynamics and precise diction. Built for spots that demand pace, expression, and clarity.
